rationale: Educ. Code §45.205 governs school district depository bank contract terms and extensions. It is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 45.205. TERM OF CONTRACT. (a) Except as provided by Subsection (b), the depository bank when selected shall serve for a term of two years and until its successor is selected and has qualified.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns depository contracts, not homestead exemptions.
